channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: US rescues missing crew member in Iran
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- US claims airman rescued, Iran says operation foiled
- US airman injured but safe after rescue from inside Iran, Trump says
- US commandos went deep into Iran to rescue downed airman: media
- US media says commandos probed deep into Iran to rescue downed airman
- US rescues airman: What we know and what remains undisclosed
- Iranian media claims clashes with US forces during rescue of American airman
- Israeli intelligence helped US airman rescue mission in Iran, official says
- Commandos probed deep into Iran to rescue downed airman: US media
- US rescues airman as Trump, Israel pressure Iran ahead of deadline
- US media says commandos probed deep into Iran to rescue downed airman
- US media says commandos probed deep into Iran to rescue downed airman
- US rescues downed fighter pilot from Iran in 'daring' operation
- ‘Miraculous’: US rescues second pilot downed in Iran, Trump confirms
- Dozens of aircraft, deception effort: How US rescued airman from downed F-15 jet in Iran
- US rescues second airman from fighter jet shot down in Iran
- US rescues second fighter jet airman shot down over Iran
- US rescues airman whose F-15 was downed in Iran
- U.S. rescues airman whose F-15 was downed in Iran, say U.S. officials
- US rescues airman as Trump, Israel pressure Iran ahead of deadline
- US successfully rescues second airman deep behind enemy lines in Iran, Trump confirms
- US rescues airman whose F-15 was downed in Iran, US officials say

- US rescues airman whose F-15 was downed in Iran, US officials say]]>

item.title: Trump repeats threat to strike Iran's power plants, bridges if Hormuz not reopened
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- US aviator rescued; Trump vows ‘hell’ on Iran's infrastructure if Strait of Hormuz remains closed
- US rescues airman, vows 'hell' for Iran if Strait stays shut
- FirstFT: Trump threatens to attack Iran’s power plants and bridges unless it reopens Strait of Hormuz
- Trump issues expletive-laden threat to Iran over Hormuz Strait blockage
- Trump warns Iran to reopen strait of Hormuz by Tuesday or face ‘hell’
- US rescues airman, vows 'hell' for Iran if Strait stays shut
- Trump gives Iran 48 hours to open Strait of Hormuz as search continues for missing US pilot
- US rescues airman, vows 'hell' for Iran if Strait stays shut
- Trump, on Easter, threatens ‘hell’ on Iran’s infrastructure if Strait of Hormuz remains blocked
- Trump Again Threatens to Bomb Iran's Power Plants if Strait of Hormuz Not Open by Tuesday
- Trump threatens ‘hell’ for Iran over Hormuz Strait as deadline approaches
- Trump offers no concrete plan as Strait of Hormuz closure shocks Europe
- Trump threatens to hit Iran’s infrastructure on Tuesday if Strait of Hormuz remains blocked
- Trump warns Iran of ‘hell’ if Strait of Hormuz remains closed
- Trump vows to bomb Iran infrastructure after US rescue of missing airman
- Strait of Hormuz puzzle and Donald Trump Truth Social threats to blow up power plants, bridges: Iran war braces for decisive moment as deadline nears
- Trump vows 'hell' on Iran if Strait of Hormuz not opened
- 'Open the f***in' Strait': Trump says US will strike Iran's power plants if Hormuz stays closed
- Trump asks Tehran to ‘make a deal or open up’ Hormuz; warns he would ‘rain down hell’ on Iran
- 'Gates of hell will open for you': Iran rejects Trump's 'helpless' 48-hour ultimatum to reopen Strait of Hormuz]]>

item.title: On Easter, Pope Leo urges world leaders to end wars, renounce conquest

- Pope marks first Easter under cloud of ME war

- Pope Leo Offers Message of Peace in First Easter Mass Leading Vatican
- Pope Leo calls for global leaders to choose peace in his first Easter Mass
- Pope Leo XIV invokes Pope Francis' final words in Easter plea against growing 'indifference' to war
- Pope Leo calls for hope amid global conflicts on his first Easter as pontiff
- Pope's Easter message: Leaders must choose peace over war
- Pope Leo Calls for Peace and Warns of a World Indifferent to Violence
- Pope Leo Calls for Peace and Warns of a World Indifferent to Violence
- 'Choose peace': Pope marks first Easter under cloud of Mideast war
- Pope Leo calls for peace, dialogue amid Ukraine, Iran wars in Easter mass
- Pope Leo focuses on retaining hope amid war and suffering in his first Easter Mass
- Pope Leo marks first Easter as pontiff with call for hope amid global conflicts
- Pope Leo condemns ‘violence of war’ in first Easter Mass amid Iran conflict
- Easter 2026: US-born Pope Leo delivers powerful quote of the day message amidst Iran war
- Pope Leo marks first Easter as pontiff with call for hope amid global conflicts
- Pope Leo marks first Easter as pontiff with call for hope amid global conflicts
- Pope Leo marks first Easter as pontiff with call for hope amid global conflicts
- Pope marks first Easter under cloud of Mideast war
- Pope marks first Easter under cloud of Mideast war
- Pope Marks First Easter Under Cloud Of Mideast War
- Pope marks first Easter under cloud of Mideast war
